title: Tapping to Feel Safe as a Wealthy Person
subtitle: A tapping practice for releasing the fear that visible wealth brings danger, jealousy, or unwanted pressure
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 66 of a 12-week money program. The script targets the fear that prosperity makes you a target — for jealousy, for pressure from others, for loss of privacy or safety. The reframe moves toward wealth as a peaceful, protected state.
sourceNotes: The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), in use since the mid-1990s. The script is adapted from Day 66 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use when the idea of visible wealth carries a sense of threat — the fear that having more money might invite jealousy, resentment, intrusion, or unwanted scrutiny from others.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 66 of a 12-week money program. The script targets the fear that wealth attracts problems rather than freedom — the worry about jealousy from others, increased visibility, loss of privacy, or the sense of being a target when financial life becomes comfortable. The reframe moves toward safety and quiet confidence as a wealthy person.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though I once thought wealth might make me a target, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I feared jealousy or pressure from others, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I worried wealth would attract problems, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
Eyebrow: I've wondered if wealth invites trouble.
Side of eye: I worried people might resent me.
Under eye: I feared I'd have to defend myself.
Under nose: I thought wealth might cost my privacy.
Chin: I felt exposed by abundance.
Collarbone: I'm ready to feel safe whatever my net worth.
Under arm: I release fear of being wealthy and visible.
Top of head: I allow wealth to feel peaceful and secure.
Reframe to positive
Eyebrow: I am safe and protected as wealth grows.
Side of eye: I attract supportive, trustworthy people.
Under eye: I create strong, simple safeguards where needed.
Under nose: I feel free to enjoy prosperity openly.
Chin: I let abundance bring comfort, not danger.
Collarbone: I trust life to keep me secure and content.
Under arm: I live with quiet confidence as a wealthy person.
Top of head: I feel safe and calm in lasting abundance.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from

The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), developed in the mid-1990s from Roger Callahan's Thought Field Therapy. The script is adapted from Day 66 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
